since_last: 32% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads -0.02%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 32% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.09% · BTC +0.42% · Gold +0.62% · Nasdaq100 -1.60%. 32% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at -0.02%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at -0.02%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.58%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -12.96%
cards.body: Leaders: LEU +6.22%, CSCO +2.37%, HPE +1.83%, SMR +1.77%, DELL +1.74%. Laggards: ISRG -12.96%, PUBM -6.82%, AMAT -6.11%, MDB -5.11%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.81% at $124.81
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.81% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
